title: MESIE: Multi-Element Spectral Intelligence Engine
description: MESIE is an open-source Python framework for multi-component spectral matching, PSD/FAS-compatible generation, RotDnn-style spectral handling, resonance-aware embeddings, and AI-native spectral representation for scientific, engineering, digital twin, and cognitive architecture research.
notes: Initial public research release. This version focuses on spectral matching, signal generation, validation, and embedding-ready architecture. Private/internal architecture extensions are not included in this public release.
